transformation_note: Witnessed working point: shared grid 74 BPM = the host's corrected metrical tempo (djay initially read Skyfall at ~148, a metrical-octave doubling; user corrected to ~74 — host essentially unchanged at the witnessed point). Guest correctly measured by djay at 105 BPM and slowed ~29.5% (ratio 74/105 ~= 0.705). 74 is NOT the unique grid: a ~74-90 BPM region is hypothesized viable, host character setting the upper bound (Skyfall increasingly sounds rushed beyond it). Guest apparently +2 semitones (hypothesis; verify from the session).
